pr_title: Add on-disk object cache for report-generation jobs
pr_description: Adds a small cache layer so expensive report objects can be persisted to disk and reloaded across job runs.
injected_issue: load_cached_object() deserializes cache files with pickle.load, which executes arbitrary code on load; the cache_dir is documented as potentially a shared upload directory, so an attacker who can drop a file there gains code execution.
why_tests_dont_catch_it: The round-trip test only ever loads a file that save_cached_object() itself just wrote in the same process, so it never simulates loading a file from an untrusted source.
